وعن عبد الله بن عمرو بن العاص رضي الله عنهما أن رجلا سأل رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ أي الإسلام خير‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏تطعم الطعام، وتقرأ السلام على من عرفت ومن لم تعرف‏"‏‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abdullah bin 'Amr bin Al-'as (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: A man asked the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ): "Which act in Islam is the best?" He (ﷺ) replied, "To give food, and to greet everyone, whether you know or you do not.".
iwh_en: Abdullah bin 'Amr bin Al-'as (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: "Which act in Islam is the best?" He (ﷺ) replied, "To give food, and to greet everyone, whether you know or you do not.".
iwh_id: Abdullah bin 'Amr bin Al-'as (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya Rasulullah ﷺ: "Which act in Islam is the best?" He (ﷺ) menjawab, "To memberikan food, and to greet everyone, whether you mengetahui or you jangan.".

ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ لما خلق الله تعالى آدم عليه السلام قال‏:‏ اذهب فسلم على أولئك -نفر من الملائكة جلوس- فاستمع ما يحيونك، فإنه تحيتك وتحية ذريتك‏.‏ فقال‏:‏ السلام عليكم فقالوا‏:‏ السلام عليك ورحمة الله، فزادوه‏:‏ ورحمة الله‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "When Allah created Adam (ﷺ), He said to him: 'Go and greet that company of angels who are sitting there - and then listen to what they are going to say in reply to your greetings because that will be your greeting and your off-spring's.' Adam (ﷺ) said to the angels: 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum (May peace be upon you).' They replied: 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullah (May peace be upon you and the Mercy of Allah).' Thus adding in reply to him: 'wa Rahmatullah (and the Mercy of Allah)' to his greeting.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "When Allah created Adam (ﷺ), He said to him: 'Go and greet that company of angels who are sitting there - and then listen to what they are going to say in reply to your greetings because that will be your greeting and your off-spring's.' Adam (ﷺ) said to the angels: 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum (May peace be upon you).' They replied: 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullah (May peace be upon you and the Mercy of Allah).' Thus adding in reply to him: 'wa Rahmatullah (and the Mercy of Allah)' to his greeting.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "When Allah created Adam (ﷺ), He bersabda kepadanya: 'Go dan greet that company of angels who are sitting there - and kemudian listen to what they are going to say in reply to your greetings because that will be your greeting dan your off-spring's.' Adam (ﷺ) berkata to the angels: 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum (May peace be upon you).' They menjawab: 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullah (May peace be upon you dan the Mercy of Allah).' Thus adding in reply to him: 'wa Rahmatullah (and the Mercy of Allah)' to his greeting.".

ar: وعن أبي عمارة البراء بن عازب رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ أمرنا رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم بسبع‏:‏ بعيادة المريض، واتباع الجنائز، وتشميت العاطس، ونصر الضعيف، وعون المظلوم، وإفشاء السلام وإبرار المقسم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه هذا لفظ إحدى روايات البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

matn_ar: واتباع الجنائز، وتشميت العاطس، ونصر الضعيف، وعون المظلوم، وإفشاء السلام وإبرار المقسم. ((متفق عليه هذا لفظ إحدى روايات البخاري)).

sunnah_ref_en: Al-Bara' bin 'Azib (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) commanded us to do seven things: to visit the sick, to follow the funeral (of a dead believer), to invoke the Mercy of Allah upon one who sneezes (i.e., by saying to him: Yarhamuk- Allah), to support the weak, to help the oppressed, to promote the greeting of 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum', and to help those who swear to do something to keep their oaths..
iwh_en: Al-Bara' bin 'Azib (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to do seven things: to visit the sick, to follow the funeral (of a dead believer), to invoke the Mercy of Allah upon one who sneezes (i.e., by saying to him: Yarhamuk- Allah), to support the weak, to help the oppressed, to promote the greeting of 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum', and to help those who swear to do something to keep their oaths..
iwh_id: Al-Bara' bin 'Azib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk do seven hal-hal: to visit the sick, to follow the funeral (of a dead believer), to invoke the Mercy of Allah upon one who sneezes (i.e., by saying to him: Yarhamuk- Allah), to support the lemah, to help the oppressed, to promote the greeting of 'As-Salamu 'Alaikum', and to help those who swear to do something to menjaga their oaths..

ar:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا تدخلوا الجنة حتى تؤمنوا ولا تؤمنوا حتى تحابوا أولا أدلكم على شيء إذا فعلتموه تحاببتم‏؟‏ أفشوا السلام بينكم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم ‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "By Him in Whose Hand is my life! You will not enter Jannah until you believe, and you will not believe until you love one another. Shall I inform you of something which, if you do, you will love one another? Promote greetings amongst yourselves.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "By Him in Whose Hand is my life! You will not enter Jannah until you believe, and you will not believe until you love one another. Shall I inform you of something which, if you do, you will love one another? Promote greetings amongst yourselves.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "By Him in Whose Hand is my life! You tidak akan masuk ke Jannah hingga you believe, and you tidak akan believe hingga you love satu sama lain. Shall I inform you of something which, if you do, you will love satu sama lain? Promote greetings amongst yourselves.".

ar:
وعن أبي يوسف عبد الله بن سلام رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ سمعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يقول‏:‏ ‏
"‏يا أيها الناس أفشوا السلام، وأطعموا الطعام، وصلوا الأرحام وصلوا والناس نيام، تدخلوا الجنة بسلام‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال حديث حسن صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_ar: أبي يوسف عبد الله بن سلام

sunnah_ref_en: 'Abdullah bin Salam (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) saying, "O people, exchange greetings of peace (i.e., say: As-Salamu 'Alaikum to one another), feed people, strengthen the ties of kinship, and be in prayer when others are asleep, you will enter Jannah in peace.".
iwh_en: 'Abdullah bin Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "O people, exchange greetings of peace (i.e., say: As-Salamu 'Alaikum to one another), feed people, strengthen the ties of kinship, and be in prayer when others are asleep, you will enter Jannah in peace.".
iwh_id: 'Abdullah bin Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan: I heard Rasulullah ﷺ saying, "O orang-orang, exchange greetings of peace (i.e., say: As-Salamu 'Alaikum to satu sama lain), feed orang-orang, strengthen the ties of kinship, and be in prayer when others are asleep, you will masuk ke Jannah in peace.".

ar: وعن الطفيل بن أبي بن كعب أنه كان يأتي عبد الله بن عمر، فيغدو معه إلى السوق، قال‏:‏ فإذا غدونا إلى السوق، لم يمر عبد الله على سقاط ولا صاحب بيعة، ولا مسكين، ولا أحد إلا سلم عليه، قال الطفيل، فجئت عبد الله بن عمر يومًا، فاستتبعني إلى السوق فقلت له‏:‏ ما تصنع بالسوق، وأنت لا تقف على البيع ولا تسأل عن السلع، ولا تسوم بها، ولا تجلس في مجالس السوق‏؟‏ وأقول‏:‏ اجلس بنا هاهنا نتحدث، فقال يا أبا بطن- وكان الطفيل ذا بطن- إنما نغدو من أجل السلام فنسلم على من لقيناه‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مالك في الموطأ بإسناد صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

((رواه مالك في الموطأ بإسناد صحيح)).

sunnah_ref_en: At-Tufail bin Ubayy bin Ka'b (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I used to visit 'Abdullah bin 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) in the morning and accompany him to the market. 'Abdullah offered greetings of peace to every one he met on the way, be they sellers of petty goods, traders or poor people. One day when I came to him, he asked me to accompany him to the market. I said to him: "What is the point of your going to the market when you do not sell, nor ask about articles, nor offer a price for them, nor sit down with any company of people. Let us sit down here and talk." He replied: "O Abu Batn (father of a belly) - Tufail had a large belly - we go to the market to greet everyone we meet.".
iwh_en: At-Tufail bin Ubayy bin Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i used to visit 'Abdullah bin 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with them) in the morning and accompany him to the market. 'Abdullah offered greetings of peace to every one he met on the way, be they sellers of petty goods, traders or poor people. One day when I came to him, he asked me to accompany him to the market. I said to him: "What is the point of your going to the market when you do not sell, nor ask about articles, nor offer a price for them, nor sit down with any company of people. Let us sit down here and talk." He replied: "O Abu Batn (father of a belly) - Tufail had a large belly - we go to the market to greet everyone we meet.".
iwh_id: At-Tufail bin Ubayy bin Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i biasa visit 'Abdullah bin 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhum) in the morning dan accompany him to the market. 'Abdullah offered greetings of peace to every one he met on the way, be they sellers of petty goods, traders or poor orang-orang. One day when I came to him, ia bertanya me to accompany him to the market. I bersabda to him: "What is the point of your going to the market when you jangan sell, dan tidak ask tentang articles, dan tidak offer a price for them, dan tidak duduk down with any company of orang-orang. Let us duduk down here dan talk." Ia menjawab: "O Abu Batn (father of a belly) - Tufail had a besar belly - we go to the market to greet everyone we meet.".

ar:
عن عمران بن الحصين رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ جاء رجل إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال‏:‏ السلام عليكم، فرد عليه ثم جلس، فقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ “عشر” ثم جاء آخر، فقال‏:‏ السلام عليكم ورحمة الله، فرد عليه فجلس، فقال‏:‏ ‏
"‏عشرون‏"‏ ثم جاء آخر، فقال‏:‏ السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته، فرد عليه فجلس، فقال‏:‏ “ثلاثون” ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

"عشرون" ثم جاء آخر، فقال: السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته، فرد عليه فجلس، فقال: “ثلاثون” ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي وقال: حديث حسن)).
sunnah_ref_en: 'Imran bin Husain (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: A man came to the Prophet (ﷺ) and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum (May peace be upon you). The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) responded to his greeting and the man sat down. The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Ten (meaning the man had earned the merit of ten good deeds)." Another one came and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullah (May peace be upon you and the Mercy of Allah)." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) responded to his greeting and the man sat down. The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Twenty." A third one came and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullahi wa Barakatuhu (May peace be upon you and the Mercy of Allah and His Blessings)." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) responded to his greeting and the man sat down. The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Thirty.".
iwh_en: 'Imran bin Husain (may Allah be pleased with them) reported: A man came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum (May peace be upon you). the Messenger of Allah ﷺ responded to his greeting and the man sat down. the Prophet ﷺ said, "Ten (meaning the man had earned the merit of ten good deeds)." Another one came and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullah (May peace be upon you and the Mercy of Allah)." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ responded to his greeting and the man sat down. the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Twenty." A third one came and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullahi wa Barakatuhu (May peace be upon you and the Mercy of Allah and His Blessings)." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ responded to his greeting and the man sat down. the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Thirty.".
iwh_id:
'Imran bin Husain (radhiyallahu 'anhum) meriwayatkan:
A man datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum (May peace be upon you). Rasulullah ﷺ responded to his greeting dan the man duduk down. Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Ten (meaning the man had earned the merit of ten amal shaleh)." Another one datang dan berkata: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullah (May peace be upon you dan the Mercy of Allah)." Rasulullah ﷺ responded to his greeting dan the man duduk down. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Twenty." A third one datang dan berkata: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum wa Rahmatullahi wa Barakatuhu (May peace be upon you dan the Mercy of Allah and His Blessings)." Rasulullah ﷺ responded to his greeting dan the man duduk down. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Thirty.".

sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said to me, "This is Jibril (Gabriel) who is conveying you greetings of peace." I responded: "Wa 'Alaihis-Salamu wa Rahmatullahi wa Barakatuhu (May peace be upon him and the Mercy of Allah and His Blessings).".
iwh_en: 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me, "This is Jibril (Gabriel) who is conveying you greetings of peace." I responded: "Wa 'Alaihis-Salamu wa Rahmatullahi wa Barakatuhu (May peace be upon him and the Mercy of Allah and His Blessings).".
iwh_id: 'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda to me, "This is Jibril (Gabriel) who is conveying you greetings of peace." I responded: "Wa 'Alaihis-Salamu wa Rahmatullahi wa Barakatuhu (May peace be upon him dan the Mercy of Allah and His Blessings).".

ar:
وعن أنس رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم، كان إذا تكلم بكلمة أعادها ثلاثًا حتى تفهم عنه، وإذا أتى على قوم فسلم عليهم سلم عليهم ثلاثًا‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏
وهذا محمول على ما إذا كان الجمع كثيرًا‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported the Prophet (ﷺ) used to repeat his words thrice so that the meaning thereof would be fully understood, and whenever he came upon a gathering of people, he would greet them. He would repeat Salam thrice..
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported the Prophet ﷺ used to repeat his words thrice so that the meaning thereof would be fully understood, and whenever he came upon a gathering of people, he would greet them. He would repeat Salam thrice..
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan Nabi ﷺ biasa repeat his words thrice sehingga the meaning thereof would be fully understood, dan setiap kali ia menemui a gathering of orang-orang, ia mengucapkan salam kepada mereka. Beliau repeat Salam thrice..

ar: وعن المقداد رضي الله عنه في حديثه الطويل قال‏:‏ كنا نرفع للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم نصيبه من اللبن، فيجيء من الليل، فيسلم تسليمًا لا يوقظ نائمًا، ويسمع اليقظان، فجاء النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فسلم كما كان يُسلم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن المقداد رضي الله عنه في حديثه الطويل قال: كنا نرفع للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم نصيبه من اللبن، فيجيء من الليل، فيسلم تسليمًا لا يوقظ نائمًا، ويسمع اليقظان، فجاء النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فسلم كما كان يُسلم. ((رواه مسلم)).

sunnah_ref_en: Al-Miqdad (May Allah be pleased with him) reported in a long Hadith: We used to reserve for the Prophet (ﷺ) his share of the milk, and he would come at night and offer greetings in such a manner as did not disturb those asleep and was heard only by those who were awake. In fact, the Prophet (ﷺ) came and offered greetings as usual..
iwh_en: Al-Miqdad (may Allah be pleased with him) reported in a long Hadith: We used to reserve for the Prophet ﷺ his share of the milk, and he would come at night and offer greetings in such a manner as did not disturb those asleep and was heard only by those who were awake. In fact, the Prophet ﷺ came and offered greetings as usual..
iwh_id: Al-Miqdad (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan di panjang Hadith: We biasa reserve for Nabi ﷺ his share dari milk, dan ia come at night dan offer greetings in such a manner as tidak disturb those asleep dan was mendengar only by those yang sedang awake. In fact, Nabi ﷺ datang dan offered greetings as usual..

ar: وعن أسماء بنت يزيد رضي الله عنه عنها أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم، مر في المسجد يومًا، وعصبة من النساء قعود، فألوى بيده بالتسليم‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏

sunnah_ref_en: Asma' bint Yazid (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) passed through the mosque one day and there was a group of women (about ten of them) sitting in the mosque. He raised his hand to offer greetings..
iwh_en: Asma' bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed through the mosque one day and there was a group of women (about ten of them) sitting in the mosque. He raised his hand to offer greetings..
iwh_id: Asma' bint Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ passed melalui the mosque one day dan there was a group of women (tentang ten of them) sitting in the mosque. He raised his hand to offer greetings..

ar:

"‏إن أولى الناس بالله من بدأهم بالسلام‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود بإسناد جيد، ورواه الترمذي بنحوه وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن، وقد ذكر بعده‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated Abu Umamah: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: Those who are nearest to Allah are they who are first to give a salutation.

 And At- Tirmidhi narrated its meaning and classified it as Hasan.
iwh_en:
Abu Umamah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said: Those who are nearest to Allah are they who are first to give a salutation.

 And At- Tirmidhi narrated its meaning and classified it as Hasan.
iwh_id:
Abu Umamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata: Those who are nearest to Allah are they who are pertama to memberikan a salutation.

 And At- Tirmidhi meriwayatkan its meaning dan classified it as Hasan.

ar:

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Juraiy Al-Hujaimi (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I saw the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) and said: "Alaikas-Salamu ya Rasulallah! (Upon you be peace, O Messenger of Allah)!" He said, "Do not say: 'Alaikas-Salamu (Upon you be peace).' This is the Salam to the dead.".

iwh_id: Abu Juraiy Al-Hujaimi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i saw Rasulullah ﷺ dan bersabda: "Alaikas-Salamu ya Rasulallah! (Upon you be peace, O Rasulullah)!" He bersabda, "Jangan say: 'Alaikas-Salamu (Upon you be peace).' This is the Salam to the dead.".

ar:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏"‏يسلم الراكب على الماشي، والماشي على القاعد، والقليل على الكثير” ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏  
وفي رواية للبخاري‏:‏ ‏"‏والصغير على الكبير‏"‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en:
Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, 'A rider should greet a pedestrian; a pedestrian should greet one who is sitting; and a small group should greet a large group (of people).''

.

The narration in Al-Bukhari adds: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The young should greet the elderly.''
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'A rider should greet a pedestrian; a pedestrian should greet one who is sitting; and a small group should greet a large group (of people).''

.

The narration in Al-Bukhari adds: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The young should greet the elderly.''
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, 'A rider should greet a pedestrian; a pedestrian should greet one who is sitting; dan a kecil group should greet a besar group (of orang-orang).''

.

The narration in Al-Bukhari adds: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The muda should greet the elderly.''

ar:
وعن أبي أمامة صُدي بن عجلان الباهلي رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ “إن أولى الناس بالله من بدأهم بالسلام‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود بإسناد جيد‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏ 
ورواه الترمذي عن أبي أمامة رضي الله عنه‏:‏ قيل‏:‏ يا رسول الله، الرجلان يلتقيان، أيهما يبدأ بالسلام‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏أولاهما بالله تعالى‏"‏ قال الترمذي ‏:‏ حديث حسن‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_ar: أبي أمامة صدي بن عجلان الباهلي

sunnah_ref_en:
Abu Umamah Sudaiy bin `Ajlan Al-Bahili (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The person nearest to Allah is one who is the first to offer greeting."

.

The narration in At-Tirmidhi is: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) was asked: "O Messenger of Allah! When two persons meet, who should greet the other first?'' The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The person nearest to Allah (i.e., one who is more obedient and therefore closer to Allah will say: As-Salam first)."
iwh_en:
Abu Umamah Sudaiy bin `Ajlan Al-Bahili (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The person nearest to Allah is one who is the first to offer greeting."

.

The narration in At-Tirmidhi is: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked: "O Messenger of Allah! When two persons meet, who should greet the other first?'' the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The person nearest to Allah (i.e., one who is more obedient and therefore closer to Allah will say: As-Salam first)."
iwh_id:
Abu Umamah Sudaiy bin `Ajlan Al-Bahili (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The person nearest to Allah is one who is the pertama to offer greeting."

.

The narration in At-Tirmidhi is: Rasulullah ﷺ was bertanya: "O Rasulullah! When two orang-orang meet, who should greet the other pertama?'' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The person nearest to Allah (i.e., one who is more obedient dan oleh karena itu closer to Allah will say: As-Salam pertama)."

ar:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه في حديث المسيء صلاته أنه جاء فصلى، ثم جاء النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم، فسلم عليه، فرد عليه السلام، فقال‏:‏ ‏
"‏ارجع فصلِ، فإنك لم تصلِ‏"‏ فرجع فصلى، ثم جاء فسلم على النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم، حتى فعل ذلك ثلاث مرات” ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him)reported in the Hadith concerning the person who was at fault in performing his Salat (prayer): He came to the Prophet (ﷺ) and greeted him. The Prophet (ﷺ) responded to the greeting and said, "Go back and repeat your Salat because you have not performed the Salat (properly).'' He again performed Salat as he had prayed before and came to the Prophet (ﷺ) and greeted him. The Prophet (ﷺ) responded to the greetings (and repeated his words to him). This act of repeating (the Salat and the Salam) was done thrice.

.
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him)reported in the Hadith concerning the person who was at fault in performing his Salat (prayer): He came to the Prophet ﷺ and greeted him. the Prophet ﷺ responded to the greeting and said, "Go back and repeat your Salat because you have not performed the Salat (properly).'' He again performed Salat as he had prayed before and came to the Prophet ﷺ and greeted him. the Prophet ﷺ responded to the greetings (and repeated his words to him). This act of repeating (the Salat and the Salam) was done thrice.

.
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu)meriwayatkan in the Hadith concerning the person who was at fault in performing his Salat (prayer): He datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan greeted him. Nabi ﷺ responded to the greeting dan berkata, "Go back dan repeat your Salat because you belum melaksanakan the Salat (properly).'' He again melaksanakan Salat as he had prayed sebelum dan datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan greeted him. Nabi ﷺ responded to the greetings (and repeated his words to him). This act of repeating (the Salat dan the Salam) was done thrice.

.

ar:
وعنه عن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم، قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا لقي أحدكم أخاه، فليسلم عليه، فإن حالت بينهما شجرة، أو جدار، أو حجر، ثم لقيه، فليسلم عليه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When one of you meets a brother (in Faith) he should greet him. Then if a tree or a wall or a stone intervenes between them and then he meets him again, he should greet him.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When one of you meets a brother (in Faith) he should greet him. Then if a tree or a wall or a stone intervenes between them and then he meets him again, he should greet him.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "When one of you meets a brother (in Faith) he should greet him. Kemudian if a tree or a wall or a stone intervenes antara them dan kemudian he meets him again, he should greet him.".

ar:
وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال لي رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏يا بُني، إذا دخلت على أهلك، فسلم، يكن بركة عليك، وعلى أهل بيتك‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: "يا بني، إذا دخلت على أهلك، فسلم، يكن بركة عليك، وعلى أهل بيتك" ((رواه الترمذي وقال: حديث حسن صحيح)).
sunnah_ref_en: Anas bin Malik (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said to me, "Dear son, when you enter your house, say As- Salamu 'Alaikum to your family, for it will be a blessing both to you and to your family.".
iwh_en: Anas bin Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me, "Dear son, when you enter your house, say As- Salamu 'Alaikum to your family, for it will be a blessing both to you and to your family.".
iwh_id: Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda to me, "Dear son, when you masuk ke your house, say As- Salamu 'Alaikum to your family, for it will be a blessing both to you dan to your family.".

ar: عن أنس رضي الله عنه أنه مر على صبيان، فسلم عليهم، وقال‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفعله” ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: عن أنس رضي الله عنه أنه مر على صبيان، فسلم عليهم، وقال: كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفعله” ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar: عن أنس رضي الله عنه أنه مر على صبيان، فسلم عليهم، وقال‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفعله” ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
matn_ar_clean: عن أنس رضي الله عنه أنه مر على صبيان، فسلم عليهم، وقال‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يفعله” ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
sunnah_ref_en:
Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported that he passed by some children and greeted them. Then he said: "Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to do the same."

.
iwh_en:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that he passed by some children and greeted them. Then he said: "Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to do the same."

.
iwh_id:
Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa he melewati some children dan greeted them. Kemudian he bersabda: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa do the same."

.

ar: عن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ كانت فينا امرأة -وفي رواية‏:‏ كانت لنا عجوز- تأخذ من أصول السلق فتطرحه في القدر، وتكركر حبات من شعير، فإذا صلينا الجمعة، وانصرفنا، نُسلم عليها، فتقدمه إلينا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Sahl bin Sa`d (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: There was a woman (in another narration; an old woman) among us who would put beet root in a pot and add to it some ground barley. She used to cook them together. On returning from the Friday prayer, we would greet her and she would offer it to us.

.
iwh_en:
Sahl bin Sa`d (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: There was a woman (in another narration; an old woman) among us who would put beet root in a pot and add to it some ground barley. She used to cook them together. On returning from the Friday prayer, we would greet her and she would offer it to us.

.
iwh_id:
Sahl bin Sa`d (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan:
There was seorang perempuan (in another narration; an tua woman) di antara us yang akan meletakkan beet root di pot dan add to it some ground barley. She biasa cook them together. On returning dari Friday shalat, kami greet her dan ia offer it to us.

.

ar: وعن أم هانئ فاختة بنت أبي طالب رضي الله عنه قالت‏:‏ أتيت النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يوم الفتح وهو يغتسل، وفاطمة تستره بثوب، فسلمت، وذكرت الحديث” ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_ar: أم هانئ فاختة بنت أبي طالب

sunnah_ref_en:
Umm Hani (May Allah be pleased with her), the daughter of Abu Talib reported: I went to the Prophet (ﷺ) on the day of the conquest of Makkah. He was taking a bath and Fatimah was screening him with a cloth. I greeted him. And she mentioned the rest of the Hadith.

.
iwh_en:
Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her), the daughter of Abu Talib reported: I went to the Prophet ﷺ on the day of the conquest of Makkah. He was taking a bath and Fatimah was screening him with a cloth. I greeted him. And she mentioned the rest of the Hadith.

.
iwh_id:
Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha), the putri of Abu Talib meriwayatkan:
I pergi kepada Nabi ﷺ on the day of the conquest of Makkah. He was taking a mandi and Fatimah was screening him with a cloth. I greeted him. Dan ia mentioned the rest of the Hadith.

.

ar:
وعن أسماء بنت يزيد رضي الله عنه قالت‏:‏ مر علينا النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم في نسوة فسلم علينا‏.‏ 
‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود، والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن، وهذا لفظ أبي داود))
ولفظ الترمذي‏:‏ أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم مر في المسجد يومًا، وعصبة من النساء قعود، فألوى بيده بالتسليم‏‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Asma bint Yazid (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) passed by us when we were with a party of women, and he greeted us with salam.. This is the wording of Abu Dawud.

In  At-Tirmidhi: that the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) passed through the Masjid one day, and a group of women were sitting, so he motioned his hand with the salam.
iwh_en:
Asma bint Yazid (may Allah be pleased with her) reported that the Prophet ﷺ passed by us when we were with a party of women, and he greeted us with salam.. This is the wording of Abu Dawud.

In  At-Tirmidhi: that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed through the Masjid one day, and a group of women were sitting, so he motioned his hand with the salam.
iwh_id:
Asma bint Yazid (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewati us ketika kami were dengan party of women, dan ia greeted us with salam.. This is the wording of Abu Dawud.

In At-Tirmidhi: that Rasulullah ﷺ passed melalui Masjid one day, and a group of women sedang duduk, jadi he motioned his hand dengan salam.

ar:
عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏ لا تبدءوا اليهود ولا النصارى بالسلام، فإذا لقيتم أحدهم في طريق فاضطروه إلى أضيقه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en:
Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Do not greet the Jews and the Christians before they greet you; and when you meet any one of them on the road, force him to go to the narrowest part of it."

.
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Do not greet the Jews and the Christians before they greet you; and when you meet any one of them on the road, force him to go to the narrowest part of it."

.
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Jangan greet the Jews dan the Christians sebelum they greet you; dan when you meet any one of them on the road, force him to go to the narrowest part of it."

.

ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏"‏إذا سلم عليكم أهل الكتاب فقولوا‏:‏ وعليكم” ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏
ar_clean: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "إذا سلم عليكم أهل الكتاب فقولوا: وعليكم” ((متفق عليه))
isnad_ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال:
matn_ar: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "إذا سلم عليكم أهل الكتاب فقولوا: وعليكم” ((متفق عليه))
matn_ar_clean: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "إذا سلم عليكم أهل الكتاب فقولوا: وعليكم” ((متفق عليه))
sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When the people of the Book greet you, respond with: 'Wa 'alaikum' (And upon you)"..
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When the people of the Book greet you, respond with: 'Wa 'alaikum' (And upon you)"..
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "When the orang-orang of the Book greet you, respond with: 'Wa 'alaikum' (And upon you)"..

ar: وعن أسامة رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم مر على مجلس فيه أخلاط من المسلمين والمشركين -عبدة الأوثان واليهود- فسلم عليهم النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

ar: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ ‏"‏إذا انتهى أحدكم إلى المجلس فليسلم، فإذا أراد أن يقوم فليسلم، فليست الأولى بأحق من الآخرة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود، والترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏"‏‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en:
Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When one of you arrives in a gathering, he should offer Salam to those who are already there, and he should also do so when he intends to depart. The first act of greeting is not more meritorious than the last.''

.
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When one of you arrives in a gathering, he should offer Salam to those who are already there, and he should also do so when he intends to depart. The first act of greeting is not more meritorious than the last.''

.
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "When one of you arrives di gathering, he harus offer Salam to those yang are already there, dan ia harus juga do jadi ketika ia intends to depart. The pertama act of greeting bukan more meritorious than the terakhir.''

.

ar: وعن أبي موسي الأشعري رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ “ الاستئذان ثلاث، فإن أذن لك وإلا فارجع‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Musa Al-Ash'ari (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Permission is to be sought thrice. If permission is granted, you may enter; otherwise, go back.".
iwh_en: Abu Musa Al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Permission is to be sought thrice. If permission is granted, you may enter; otherwise, go back.".
iwh_id: Abu Musa Al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Permission is to be mencari thrice. If permission is granted, you may masuk ke; otherwise, go back.".

ar:

sunnah_ref_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Seeking permission to enter (somebody's house) has been prescribed in order to restrain the eyes (from looking at something we are not supposed to look at).".
iwh_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Seeking permission to enter (somebody's house) has been prescribed in order to restrain the eyes (from looking at something we are not supposed to look at).".

ar: وعن ربعي بن حراش قال‏:‏ حدثنا رجل من بني عامر استأذن علي النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  وهو في بيت، فقال‏:‏ أألج‏؟‏ فقال رسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم  لخادمه‏:‏ ‏"‏أخرج إلي هذا وعلمه الاستئذان، فقل له‏:‏ قل‏:‏ السلام عليكم، أأدخل‏؟‏” فسمعه الرجل فقال‏:‏ السلام عليكم، أأدخل‏؟‏ فأذن له النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ، فدخل‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود بإسناد صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

((رواه أبو داود بإسناد صحيح)).

sunnah_ref_en: Rib'i bin Hirash (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: A man of Banu 'Amir tribe has told us that he had asked the Prophet (ﷺ) for permission to enter when he was at home. He said: "May I enter?" the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said to the servant, "Go out and instruct him about the manner of seeking permission. Tell him to say: As-Salamu 'Alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?" The man heard this and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?" The Prophet (ﷺ) then granted him permission and he entered..
iwh_en: Rib'i bin Hirash (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man of Banu 'Amir tribe has told us that he had asked the Prophet ﷺ for permission to enter when he was at home. He said: "May I enter?" the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to the servant, "Go out and instruct him about the manner of seeking permission. Tell him to say: As-Salamu 'Alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?" The man heard this and said: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?" the Prophet ﷺ then granted him permission and he entered..
iwh_id: Rib'i bin Hirash (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki of Banu 'Amir tribe has memberitahu kami that he had bertanya Nabi ﷺ for permission to masuk ke ketika ia sedang at home. He berkata: "May I masuk ke?" Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada servant, "Go out dan instruct him tentang the manner of seeking permission. Tell him to say: As-Salamu 'Alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?" The man mendengar this dan berkata: "As-Salamu 'Alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?" Nabi ﷺ kemudian mengizinkannya permission dan ia entered..

ar:
عن كلدة بن الحنبل رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ أتيت النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ، فدخلت عليه ولم أسلم، فقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏

sunnah_ref_en: Kildah bin Al-Hanbal (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I visited the Prophet (ﷺ) and I entered his house without seeking permission. So he said, "Go back and say: 'As-Salamu 'alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?"'.
iwh_en: Kildah bin Al-Hanbal (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i visited the Prophet ﷺ and I entered his house without seeking permission. So he said, "Go back and say: 'As-Salamu 'alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?"'.
iwh_id: Kildah bin Al-Hanbal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa i visited Nabi ﷺ dan aku entered his house tanpa seeking permission. Jadi he berkata, "Go back dan berkata: 'As-Salamu 'alaikum (may peace be upon you). May I come in?"'.

ar:
عن أنس رضي الله عنه في حديثه المشهور في الإسراء قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏ثم صعد بي جبريل إلي السماء الدنيا فاستفتح، فقيل‏:‏ من هذا‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ جبريل، قيل‏:‏ومن معك‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ محمد‏.‏ ثم صعد إلي السماء الثانية والثالثة والرابعة وسائرهن، ويقال في باب كل سماء‏:‏ من هذا‏؟‏ فيقول‏:‏ جبريل‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported in the course of his famous Hadith pertaining to Al-Isra' (the Ascension) that Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Then Jibril (Gabriel) ascended along with me to the nearest heaven and requested for the gate to be opened. He was asked: `Who is there?' He replied: `Jibril.' He was asked: `Who is with you?' He said: `Muhammad.' Then he ascended to the second heaven and requested for the opening of the gate. He was asked: `Who is there?' He said: `Jibril.' He was asked: `Who is with you?' He replied: `Muhammad.' In the same way he ascended to the third, fourth and all the heavens (i.e., until the seventh). At all of the gates he was asked: `Who is there?' He replied: Jibril.'''

.
iwh_en:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported in the course of his famous Hadith pertaining to Al-Isra' (the Ascension) that Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Then Jibril (Gabriel) ascended along with me to the nearest heaven and requested for the gate to be opened. He was asked: `Who is there?' He replied: `Jibril.' He was asked: `Who is with you?' He said: `Muhammad.' Then he ascended to the second heaven and requested for the opening of the gate. He was asked: `Who is there?' He said: `Jibril.' He was asked: `Who is with you?' He replied: `Muhammad.' In the same way he ascended to the third, fourth and all the heavens (i.e., until the seventh). At all of the gates he was asked: `Who is there?' He replied: Jibril.'''

.
iwh_id:
Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan di course of his famous Hadith pertaining to Al-Isra' (the Ascension) that Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Kemudian Jibril (Gabriel) ascended along with me kepada nearest heaven dan requested untuk gate to be opened. He was bertanya: `Who is there?' Ia menjawab: `Jibril.' He was bertanya: `Who is with you?' He berkata: `Muhammad.' Kemudian he ascended kepada second heaven dan requested untuk opening dari gate. He was bertanya: `Who is there?' He berkata: `Jibril.' He was bertanya: `Who is with you?' Ia menjawab: `Muhammad.' In the same way he ascended kepada third, fourth dan all langit (i.e., hingga the seventh). At all dari gates he was bertanya: `Who is there?' Ia menjawab: Jibril.'''

.

"‏من هذا‏؟‏‏"‏ فقلت‏:‏ أبو ذر، ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Dharr (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: I stepped out one night and saw the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) walking by himself. I began to walk in the moonlit night. He turned round and saw me and asked, "Who is there?" I replied: "Abu Dharr.".
iwh_en: Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i stepped out one night and saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ walking by himself. I began to walk in the moonlit night. He turned round and saw me and asked, "Who is there?" I replied: "Abu Dharr.".
iwh_id: Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i stepped out one night dan saw Rasulullah ﷺ walking by himself. I began to berjalan in the moonlit night. He turned round dan saw me dan bertanya, "Who is there?" I menjawab: "Abu Dharr.".

sunnah_ref_en: Umm Hani (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: I went to the Prophet (ﷺ) who was taking a bath while Fatimah was screening him. He asked, "Who is there?" I replied: "I am Umm Hani.".
iwh_en: Umm Hani (may Allah be pleased with her) reported that i went to the Prophet ﷺ who was taking a bath while Fatimah was screening him. He asked, "Who is there?" I replied: "I am Umm Hani.".
iwh_id: Umm Hani (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan bahwa i went to Nabi ﷺ who was taking a mandi while Fatimah was screening him. Ia bertanya, "Who is there?" I menjawab: "I am Umm Hani.".

ar: وعن جابر رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ أتيت النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  فدققت الباب، فقال ‏"‏من ذا‏؟‏‏"‏ فقلت‏:‏ أنا، فقال‏:‏ ‏"‏أنا أنا‏؟‏‏!‏‏"‏ كـأنه كرهها ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

"‏إن الله يحب العطاس، ويكره التثاؤب، فإذا عطس أحدكم وحمد الله تعالي كان حقاً علي كل مسلم سمعه أن يقول له‏:‏يرحمك الله، وأما التثاؤب فإنما هو من الشيطان، فإذا تثاءب أحدكم فليرده ما استطاع، فإن أحدكم إذا تثاءب ضحك منه الشيطان‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en:
Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Allah likes sneezing and dislikes yawning. When any one of you sneezes and says `Al-hamdu lillah (praise be to Allah)', it becomes obligatory upon every Muslim who hears him to respond with `Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you)'. Yawning is from the devil. When one of you feels like yawning, he should restrain it as much as possible, for the devil laughs when one of you yawns."

.
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "Allah likes sneezing and dislikes yawning. When any one of you sneezes and says `Al-hamdu lillah (praise be to Allah)', it becomes obligatory upon every Muslim who hears him to respond with `Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you)'. Yawning is from the devil. When one of you feels like yawning, he should restrain it as much as possible, for the devil laughs when one of you yawns."

.
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Allah likes sneezing dan dislikes yawning. When any one of you sneezes dan berkata `Al-hamdu lillah (praise be to Allah)', it becomes obligatory upon every Muslim who hears him to respond with `Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you)'. Yawning is from the devil. When one of you feels like yawning, he should restrain it as much as possible, for the devil laughs when one of you yawns."

.

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "When one of you sneezes he should say: 'Al-hamdu lillah (praise be to Allah),' and his brother or his companion should say to him: 'Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you).' When he says this he should reply: 'Yahdikum-ullah wa yuslihu balakum (may Allah guide you and render sound your state of affairs)."'.
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "When one of you sneezes he should say: 'Al-hamdu lillah (praise be to Allah),' and his brother or his companion should say to him: 'Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you).' When he says this he should reply: 'Yahdikum-ullah wa yuslihu balakum (may Allah guide you and render sound your state of affairs)."'.
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "When one of you sneezes he harus say: 'Al-hamdu lillah (praise be to Allah),' and saudaranya or his companion harus say to him: 'Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you).' Ketika ia berkata this he harus reply: 'Yahdikum-ullah wa yuslihu balakum (may Allah guide you dan render sound your state of affairs)."'.

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Musa (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When one of you sneezes and praises Allah (i.e., says Al-hamdu lillah), you should invoke Allah's Mercy upon him (i.e., say Yarhamuk-Allah); but if he does not praise Allah, you should not respond." .

sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: When two men sneezed in the presence of the Prophet (ﷺ), he responded to one with "Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you)" and did not respond to the other. The latter said to him: "You invoked a blessing on this man but did not do so in my case." The Prophet (ﷺ) replied, "He praised Allah (i.e., he said 'Al-hamdu lillah') but you did not.".
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that when two men sneezed in the presence of the Prophet ﷺ, he responded to one with "Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you)" and did not respond to the other. The latter said to him: "You invoked a blessing on this man but did not do so in my case." the Prophet ﷺ replied, "He praised Allah (i.e., he said 'Al-hamdu lillah') but you did not.".
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa when two men sneezed in the presence of Nabi ﷺ, he responded to one with "Yarhamuk-Allah (may Allah have mercy on you)" and tidak respond to the other. The latter bersabda kepadanya: "You invoked a blessing on this man namun tidak do jadi in my case." Nabi ﷺ menjawab, "He praised Allah (i.e., he berkata 'Al-hamdu lillah') namun you tidak.".

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: Whenever the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) sneezed, he would cover his mouth with his hand or a piece of cloth - thereby suppressing the sound..

Abu Khattab Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i bertanya Anas: "Did the Companions of Rasulullah ﷺ menggunakan to shake hands?'' He bersabda: "Yes.''

ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ لما جاء أهل اليمن قال رسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ “قد جاءكم أهل اليمن، وهم أول من جاء بالمصافحة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود بإسناد صحيح‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: When the people of Yemen came, the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The people of Yemen have visited you. They are the first to introduce the tradition of handshaking.".
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that when the people of Yemen came, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The people of Yemen have visited you. They are the first to introduce the tradition of handshaking.".
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa when the orang-orang of Yemen came, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The orang-orang of Yemen have visited you. They are the pertama to introduce the tradition of handshaking.".

ar:

sunnah_ref_en: Al-Bara' (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Two Muslims will not meet and shake hands without having their sins forgiven (by Allah ) before they depart.".

ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رجل‏:‏ يا رسول الله، الرجل منا يلقي أخاه أو صديقه، أينحني له قال‏:‏ ‏"‏لا‏"‏ قال‏:‏ أفيلتزمه ويقبله‏؟‏فال‏:‏ ‏"‏لا‏"‏ قال‏:‏ فيأخذ بيده ويصافحه‏؟‏ قال‏:‏‏"‏نعم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال: قال رجل: يا رسول الله، الرجل منا يلقي أخاه أو صديقه، أينحني له قال: "لا" قال: أفيلتزمه ويقبله؟فال: "لا" قال: فيأخذ بيده ويصافحه؟ قال:"نعم" ((رواه الترمذي وقال: حديث حسن)).

sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: A man asked: "O Messenger of Allah! When a man meets a brother or a friend, should he bow to him?" He said, "No." The man asked whether he should embrace and kiss him? The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) replied, "No." He asked whether he should hold his hand and shake it? The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) replied, "Yes.".
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man asked: "O Messenger of Allah! When a man meets a brother or a friend, should he bow to him?" He said, "No." The man asked whether he should embrace and kiss him? the Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, "No." He asked whether he should hold his hand and shake it? the Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, "Yes.".
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya: "O Rasulullah! When seorang laki-laki meets a brother or a friend, should he bow to him?" He bersabda, "No." The man bertanya whether he should embrace dan kiss him? Rasulullah ﷺ menjawab, "No." Ia bertanya whether he should hold his hand dan shake it? Rasulullah ﷺ menjawab, "Yes.".

ar: وعن صفوان بن عسال رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال يهودي لصاحبه‏:‏ اذهب بنا إلي هذا النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فأتيا رسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم ، فسألاه عن تسع آيات بينات؛ فذكر الحديث إلي قوله‏:‏ فقبلا يده ورجله، وقالا‏:‏ نشهد أنك نبي‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وغيره بأسانيد صحيحة‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Safwan bin 'Assal (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: A Jew asked his companion to take him to the Prophet (ﷺ); and when they came to the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ), they asked him about the nine clear signs (given to Prophet Musa). Safwan narrated the long Hadith which concludes: They kissed the hands and feet of the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) and said: "We testify that you are a Prophet."
iwh_en: Safwan bin 'Assal (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a Jew asked his companion to take him to the Prophet ﷺ; and when they came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, they asked him about the nine clear signs (given to Prophet Musa). Safwan narrated the long Hadith which concludes: They kissed the hands and feet of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: "We testify that you are a Prophet."
iwh_id: Safwan bin 'Assal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a Jew bertanya his companion to mengambil him to Nabi ﷺ; dan ketika mereka datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, they bertanya him tentang the nine clear signs (given to Prophet Musa). Safwan They kissed the hands dan feet of Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: "We testify that you are a Prophet."

ar: وعن ابن عمر، رضي الله عنهما، قصة قال فيها‏:‏ فدنونا من النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  فقبلنا يده‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن ابن عمر، رضي الله عنهما، قصة قال فيها: فدنونا من النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقبلنا يده" ((رواه أبو داود)).

sunnah_ref_en: In a narration of Ibn Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) at the end of the narration of the Hadith ) he said: "We came near the Prophet (ﷺ) and kissed his hand."
iwh_en: In a narration of Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with them) at the end of the narration of the Hadith ) he said: "We came near the Prophet ﷺ and kissed his hand."
iwh_id: In a narration of Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhum) at the end of the narration of the Hadith ) he berkata: "We came near Nabi ﷺ dan kissed his hand."

ar: وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ قدم زيد بن حارثة المدينة ورسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم  في بيتي، فأتاه فقرع الباب، فقام إليه النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  يجر ثوبه، فاعتنقه وقبله‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه الترمذي وقال‏:‏ حديث حسن‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: Zaid bin Harithah came to the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) when he was in my house. Zaid knocked at the door. The Prophet (ﷺ) rose to receive him, trailing his garment. He embraced and kissed him..
iwh_en: 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) reported: Zaid bin Harithah came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he was in my house. Zaid knocked at the door. the Prophet ﷺ rose to receive him, trailing his garment. He embraced and kissed him..
iwh_id:
'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan:
Zaid bin Harithah datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ ketika ia sedang in my house. Zaid knocked at the door. Nabi ﷺ rose to receive him, trailing his pakaian. He embraced dan kissed him..

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Dharr (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said to me, "Do not belittle any good deed, even your meeting with your brother (Muslim) with a cheerful face.".
iwh_en: Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me, "Do not belittle any good deed, even your meeting with your brother (Muslim) with a cheerful face.".
iwh_id: Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda to me, "Jangan belittle any baik deed, even your meeting with your brother (Muslim) with a cheerful face.".

ar:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قبل النبي،صلى الله عليه وسلم الحسن بن على، رضي الله عنهما، فقال الأقرع بن حابس‏:‏ إن لي عشرة من الولد ما قبلت منهم أحداً‏.‏ فقال رسول الله صلى  الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏من لا يرحم لا يرحم‏!‏‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Prophet (ﷺ) kissed his grandson Hasan bin 'Ali in the presence of Aqra' bin Habis. Thereupon Aqra' remarked: "I have ten children and I have never kissed any one of them." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) cast a glance upon him and said, "He who does not show mercy to others, will not be shown mercy.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ kissed his grandson Hasan bin 'Ali in the presence of Aqra' bin Habis. Thereupon Aqra' remarked: "I have ten children and I have never kissed any one of them." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ cast a glance upon him and said, "He who does not show mercy to others, will not be shown mercy.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ kissed his grandson Hasan bin 'Ali in the presence of Aqra' bin Habis. Thereupon Aqra' remarked: "I have ten children dan aku have never kissed any one of them." Rasulullah ﷺ cast a glance upon him dan berkata, "Barangsiapa yang does not menunjukkan mercy to others, tidak akan be ditunjukkan mercy.".
